query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `vuln_trend_entries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `snapshot_id` int NOT NULL,
  `engagement_id` int NOT NULL,
  `hostname` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `vuln_title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `severity` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `category` varchar(128),
  `confidence` int,
  `cve` varchar(64),
  `tool` varchar(64),
  `status` enum('new','existing','resolved','regressed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
  `first_seen_snapshot_id` int,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `vuln_trend_engagement_idx` (`engagement_id`),
  INDEX `vuln_trend_snapshot_idx` (`snapshot_id`),
  INDEX `vuln_trend_hostname_idx` (`hostname`)
);
